title: Sweet Gooey Mediterranean Figs Mousse
description: A light, sweet mousse that balances the natural tartness of figs with a silky sugar syrup, perfect for kids and lowFODMAP diets.
instructions: Combine sugar, water, and lemon juice in a small saucepan; bring to a gentle boil and let simmer for 3 minutes to dissolve the sugar, then remove from heat and keep warm.
Blend the fresh figs with Greek yogurt and vanilla extract until smooth.
Whisk the agar‑agar into a tablespoon of the warm syrup until fully dissolved, then slowly stir the mixture back into the fig mixture.
Pour the combined mixture into 4 ramekins, swirling to create a smooth surface.
Chill the ramekins in the refrigerator for 1–2 hours, or until set.
Whip the heavy cream to soft peaks, then gently fold a small amount into the chilled mousse for extra fluffiness, if desired.
Serve each ramekin topped with a swirl of whipped cream and a sprinkle of crushed pistachios for crunch and visual appeal.
